name: Saucy Beef Taco Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the mild green chilies and drain them.
2. Prepare the refrigerated crescent rolls by pressing into a greased 9 to 10-inch pie pan to form a crust.
3. Brown the ground beef and onion in a large frying pan or Dutch oven, then pour off drippings.
4. Add taco sauce, diced green chilies, and sliced olives to the beef mixture.
5. Sprinkle crushed corn chips evenly over the dough.
6. Spread the beef mixture evenly over the chips, then spread with sour cream.
7. Cover with shredded Monterey Jack cheese and shredded Cheddar Cheese.
8. Sprinkle remaining crushed chips on top.
9. Garnish with sliced olives, mushrooms (if using), lettuce, avocado, tomato, and a small amount of taco sauce.
10. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 20 to 25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
11. Cut into wedges and serve.
